name: Codex
local_observations: This repository uses AGENTS.md, .agents/skills, Codex goals, plugin search, commentary/final channels, and explicit git directives in the installed Codex desktop environment.
instruction_sources: CLAUDE.md when present for repo-specific compatibility
mcp: Use repo-local .codex/config.toml when trusted by the local Codex installation; verify available tools before claiming support.
permissions: Respect the active sandbox and approval policy. Treat external writes, destructive cleanup, and publication as separate authority.
autonomy: Use goals only when requested, keep bounded steps, and update plans for multi-step work.
evidence_capture: Record command output, file diffs, verification gates, screenshots where relevant, and Karpathy memory at phase boundaries.
handoff: Use current waypoint files, final summaries, and git directives for staged work.
recovery: If a capability is not installed, search tools/plugins first, then label the missing support rather than inventing it.
public_boundary_verification: Run the public command, app, site, package, or API boundary that corresponds to the claim.
